title: Rodent Proofing in Franklin Square, Long Island
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Protect your home from mice and rats with expert exclusion. $500-$3,000. Free inspection!
intro: Franklin Square homeowners face unique rodent challenges due to the area's mix of suburban homes and proximity to commercial districts along Hempstead Turnpike. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive rodent proofing services designed to seal entry points and protect your property from mice and rats year-round. Our expert technicians use proven exclusion methods tailored to Franklin Square's residential architecture.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and surrounding Long Island communities for years, understanding the specific rodent pressures facing local homeowners. Our licensed technicians provide thorough inspections, permanent exclusion solutions, and warranty-backed service to ensure your home stays rodent-free.
localContext: Franklin Square's tree-lined streets and well-established neighborhoods feature homes built from the 1940s-1960s that often have foundation gaps, roof vulnerabilities, and utility penetrations that rodents exploit. Properties near the Village Green shopping areas and older commercial buildings along New Hyde Park Road are particularly susceptible to rodent activity during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Rodent proofing services in Franklin Square typically range from $500 to $3,000 depending on the size of your home, severity of entry points, and materials needed. Most Franklin Square residential properties fall in the $800-$1,500 range for comprehensive exclusion work including foundation sealing, vent screening, and exterior gap repairs.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing take in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Most rodent proofing projects in Franklin Square are completed in 1-2 days depending on home size and the number of entry points identified. Our technicians conduct a thorough inspection, seal all vulnerable areas including foundations, rooflines, utility penetrations, and vents, then provide documentation of all work performed with warranty coverage.

faqs.question: What are common rodent entry points in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: In Franklin Square's older housing stock, common rodent entry points include foundation cracks and gaps, deteriorated weather stripping around garage doors, roof soffit gaps, dryer and utility vents without proper screening, and spaces around pipes and cables entering the home. Properties with attached garages and basement access require special attention to prevent rodent infiltration.

faqs.question: Is rodent proofing a permanent solution for Franklin Square properties?
faqs.answer: When properly installed by professionals, rodent proofing provides long-term protection for Franklin Square homes. We use durable materials like steel mesh, concrete sealants, and weatherproof barriers designed to withstand Long Island's climate. Most of our rodent exclusion work comes with warranties, and we recommend annual inspections to ensure all seals remain intact and effective.
